qa_pairs.question: How can a user verify the IPv6 configuration on a Linux system after setup?
qa_pairs.answer: A user can verify the IPv6 configuration on their Linux system by running the command `$ ip -6 address` in the terminal.

qa_pairs.question: What is the command to confirm that IPv6 functionality is working on a Linux system?
qa_pairs.answer: To confirm that IPv6 is working on a Linux system, a user should run the command `$ ping6 -c 1 www.google.com` in the terminal.
